providers.name: Groq
providers.free_models: llama-3.3-70b-versatile, llama-3.1-8b-instant, llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct, llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct, qwen3-32b, gpt-oss-120b, kimi-k2-instruct, deepseek-r1-distill-70b, whisper-large-v3, whisper-large-v3-turbo
providers.notes: Ultra-fast LPU inference. No credit card required.

providers.name: Google Gemini (AI Studio)
providers.free_models: Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, Gemini 3 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, Gemma 3 27B/12B/4B/1B
providers.notes: Not available in EU/UK/CH. 1M context, 65K output. Free tier may be used for training.

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.free_models: deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528:free, deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3-0324:free, qwen/qwen3.6-plus:free, qwen/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b:free, meta-llama/llama-4-scout:free, meta-llama/llama-4-maverick:free, google/gemma-4-31b-it:free, nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free, minimax/minimax-m2.5:free, + ~23 more
providers.rate_limits: 20 RPM / 200 RPD (free); 1,000 RPD with $10 lifetime topup
providers.notes: OpenAI SDK-compatible. Free models tagged ':free'. Best variety of any single gateway.

providers.name: Cerebras
providers.notes: ~2,600 tok/s. Fastest free tier for large models. No credit card.

providers.name: Cloudflare Workers AI
providers.notes: No credit card. 50+ models. Great for edge deployment.

providers.name: GitHub Models
providers.free_models: gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4o, o3-mini, o4-mini, Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E, Llama-4-Maverick-17B-128E, Llama-3.3-70B, DeepSeek-R1, Mistral-Small-3.1, + 35 more
providers.rate_limits: 10–15 RPM / 50–150 RPD (context-window limited: 8K in / 4K out on free)
providers.notes: Requires GitHub account. Extremely restrictive token limits on free tier.

providers.name: Cohere
providers.free_models: Command A (111B), Command R+, Command R, Command R7B, Embed 4, Rerank 3.5
providers.notes: Non-commercial use only. Strong embedding/reranking if that's your use case.

providers.name: Mistral AI (La Plateforme)
providers.free_models: Mistral Small 4, Mistral Medium 3, Mistral Large 3, Mistral Nemo 12B, Codestral, Pixtral Large
providers.notes: Free Experiment plan, no credit card. Phone verification may be required.

providers.name: Hugging Face Inference API
providers.free_models: Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3, Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1, Phi-3.5-mini-instruct, Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, + thousands of community models
providers.notes: Thousands of models. Serverless — scales to zero when idle. Great for experimentation.

providers.name: NVIDIA NIM
providers.free_models: deepseek-ai/deepseek-r1, nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1, nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b, nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b, meta/llama-3.1-405b-instruct, qwen/qwen2.5-72b-instruct, nvidia/nemotron-nano-2-vl (vision), + 90 more
providers.notes: 100+ models. Requires NVIDIA Developer Program (free). Phone verification.

providers.name: OVHcloud AI Endpoints
providers.free_models: Meta-Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B, Qwen3-32B, Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B, Qwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct, Mixtral-8x7B, + 30 more
providers.rate_limits: 2 RPM anonymous (no signup required); 400 RPM with API key
providers.notes: Zero-friction: no signup, no API key for basic free use. EU-hosted. Great for quick tests.

providers.name: SiliconFlow
providers.free_models: Qwen3-8B, deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-0528-Qwen3-8B, deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B, THUDM/glm-4-9b-chat, THUDM/GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking (vision), deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-OCR
providers.rate_limits: 1,000 RPM / 50K TPM (free tier: 14 CNY signup credit)
providers.notes: China-based. Good for OCR and Chinese-language tasks.

providers.name: Z AI (Zhipu AI)
providers.notes: China-based. Permanent free tier, no credit card. Good Chinese language support.

providers.name: LLM7.io
providers.free_models: deepseek-r1-0528, deepseek-v3-0324, gemini-2.5-flash-lite, gpt-4o-mini, mistral-small-3.1-24b, qwen2.5-coder-32b, + ~24 more
providers.rate_limits: 30 RPM (120 with token); no registration needed
providers.notes: Zero-friction gateway. No registration for basic access. 30+ models.

providers.name: ModelScope
providers.free_models: Qwen/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B, Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B, Qwen/Qwen-Image (img gen), + many more
providers.notes: China-based. Requires Alibaba Cloud account + real-name verification.

providers.name: Ollama Cloud
providers.free_models: llama3.1:cloud, deepseek-r1:cloud, qwen2.5:cloud, gemma2:cloud, mistral:cloud, + 400 more
providers.rate_limits: Session/weekly limits (unpublished, light usage free tier)
providers.notes: NOT OpenAI SDK-compatible — uses Ollama API. 400+ models. Good for self-hosted model experience without infra.

providers.name: Vercel AI Gateway
providers.free_models: Routes to OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, Cohere, etc. via unified gateway
providers.notes: Not a model provider — a proxy/gateway. Use with any provider's API key. Good for switching between providers.
